demographics.living_situation: lives independently in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I'm peeing glass, I have to run to the toilet every ten minutes, and the urine is bright red.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning when I wee and the constant urgency came on suddenly yesterday and it's kept me up all night, and now there's visible blood in it and I'm really scared.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 18 hours ago, came on fairly suddenly
symptom_narrative.duration: since yesterday and it hasn't let up
symptom_narrative.character: a severe burning, stinging pain every time I pass urine, like peeing glass
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really distressing — it's stopped me sleeping and I'm anxious about the blood
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: down below when I wee, and a dull ache low in my tummy above the pubic bone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst on passing urine; I'm going every ten minutes but only tiny amounts come out
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — I tried some alkaliser sachets from the chemist and they barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: passing urine is the worst part, and I keep feeling like I still need to go even straight after
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: there's bright pink blood in the urine, I feel like I never fully empty my bladder, and I've got a dull ache low in my belly. No high fever, no shaking chills, and no pain in my back or sides.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't think I've had anything quite like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get anything done — I have to stay right next to a toilet and I didn't sleep at all

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: urinary alkaliser sachets from the pharmacy

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: It seemed to start after sex the other night — I didn't go to the toilet afterwards. I'm hesitant to drink much water because weeing hurts so much.

objective_data_offered.value: bright pink / red-tinged urine that I can see when I go
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's visual description of urine colour, not a laboratory measurement

objective_data_offered.value: 37.2 degrees on my home thermometer, so no real fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home thermometer
